name: clerk-skills
description: Official Clerk authentication skills for AI coding agents

metadata.description: Complete Clerk authentication toolkit with router for setup, custom UI, Next.js patterns, organizations, webhooks, testing, and native mobile (Swift and Android)

plugins.name: clerk
plugins.description: Clerk authentication router - automatically routes to the right skill based on your task

plugins.name: clerk-setup
plugins.description: Add Clerk authentication to any project by following the official quickstart guides

plugins.name: clerk-custom-ui
plugins.description: Custom authentication flows (useSignIn, useSignUp hooks) and component appearance customization

plugins.name: clerk-nextjs-patterns
plugins.description: Advanced Next.js patterns - middleware, Server Actions, caching with Clerk

plugins.name: clerk-orgs
plugins.description: Clerk Organizations for B2B SaaS - create multi-tenant apps with org switching, role-based access, verified domains, and enterprise SSO. Use for team workspaces, RBAC, org-based routing, member management.

plugins.name: clerk-webhooks
plugins.description: Clerk webhooks for real-time events and data syncing. Listen for user creation, updates, deletion, and organization events. Build event-driven features like database sync, notifications, integrations.

plugins.name: clerk-testing
plugins.description: E2E testing for Clerk apps. Use with Playwright or Cypress for auth flow tests

plugins.name: clerk-swift
plugins.description: Native Swift/iOS Clerk auth with source-driven ClerkKit and ClerkKitUI patterns

plugins.name: clerk-android
plugins.description: Native Android Clerk auth with source-driven Kotlin and Jetpack Compose patterns

plugins.name: clerk-backend-api
plugins.description: Clerk Backend REST API explorer and executor - browse tags, inspect endpoint schemas, and execute API requests with scope enforcement
